skills.name: Electrocute
skills.description: Release a surge of electricity to attack enemies in front of you.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x4
Casting Time: 0.5 seconds
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Lightning Orb
skills.description: Create a lighting crystal while casting.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Casting Time: 1.5 seconds

skills.name: Hail
skills.description: Drop chunks of ice to continuously inflict damage on enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 5 per 1 second
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Casting Time: 1 second
Duration: CaptionTime second(s)

skills.name: Meteor
skills.description: Drop a meteor on a targeted area to inflict damage on enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Casting Time: 2 seconds
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Blizzard Storm
skills.description: Creates a snowstorm at the target area. Enemies within the skill's range receive continuous Ice property damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per 0.5 seconds: SkillFactor %
Target: CaptionRatio2
Duration: 9 seconds

skills.name: Fire Claw
skills.description: Send out a wave of fire all around to attack your enemies.

skills.name: Elemental Burst
skills.description: Charge fire, ice, and lightning property at one place while casting.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 6
Target: CaptionRatio2
Casting Time: 1 second

attributes.name: Hail: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hail] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Electrocute: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Electrocute] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Meteor: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Meteor] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hail: Freeze
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Hail] have a 20% chance per attribute level of becoming afflicted with [Freeze] for 5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Elementalist: Resistance
attributes.description:
* Increases Fire, Ice and Lightning properties by 5

* From Lv2, it increases by 5 per attribute level

attributes.name: Blizzard Storm: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Storm Bolt] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Blizzard Storm: Slow
attributes.description: * Movement speed of enemies in range of [Blizzard Storm] decreases by 2 per attribute level

attributes.name: Blizzard Storm: Second Storm
attributes.description: * Enemies in range of [Blizzard Storm] when the skill is finished take [Blizzard Storm] damage for an extra 2.5 seconds per attribute level

attributes.name: Fire Claw: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fire Claw] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Meteor: Concentration
attributes.description:
* Creates 3 fireballs around the caster upon using Meteor.

Every time you use Meteor, one fireball is consumed, and Meteor is instantly cast with no cooldown and with reduced damage and range than normal Meteor.

Once all fireballs are consumed, Meteor enters cooldown.

attributes.name: [Arts] Electrocute: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Electrocute] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hail: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Hail] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Meteor] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Blizzard Storm: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Blizzard Storm] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fire Claw: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fire Claw] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Element Mastery: Elemental
attributes.description: * Increases Elementalist skill damage dealt by 4% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Blizzard Storm: Whirlpool
attributes.description:
* Decreases hit cycle of [Blizzard Storm] by 25%, decreases target number and range.

* Increases Cooldown by 5 seconds

attributes.description:
